human_verification.notes: Verified behavioral-health-specific records, source classes, privacy and access boundaries, adjacent-lane routing, and scenario-to-ability coverage.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit refusal, escalation, and behavioral-health-specific evidence behavior.
Functionality mapping covers all shared abilities, all records-documentation-and-administration abilities, and the cross-industry artifact-awareness ability.

specialist_owned_evidence: The pack names behavioral-health-specific artifacts including psychosocial assessments, treatment plans, progress notes, screening instruments, crisis or safety-plan references, ROI records, psychotherapy-note classification, Part 2 controls, and discharge summaries.

Boundary handling is explicit for clinical content ownership, privacy or release authority, Part 2 redisclosure, legal sufficiency, payer or utilization-review decisions, and patient-safety escalations.
Retention, access, and source-conflict questions are escalated instead of overresolved.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; state-law, program-model, and storage-model variance is converted into required retrieval or escalation behavior.
Package is ready for validated spec-pack use and future retained-implementation promotion if repeated runtime demand justifies it.
